violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls in ware-washing area and front service area need repair. Floor in ware-washing room needs cleaning.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Adequate ventilation noted not present in restroom. Door not self-closing to restroom.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Lower cupboard shelving in front self-service area noted in need of cleaning.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. (lids are up)
PREMISES (1 pts): Wet mop noted in sink.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Soap and disposable towels noted not provided at hand washing lavatory in back ware-washing room.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls in back ware-washing room noted not in good repair.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Lower cupboard shelves in self-service area noted in need of cleaning and repairs.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Adequate ventilation noted not present in restroom. Door noted not self-closing.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In use utensils were noted being stored or contacting unclean surfaces. ( stored on top of hot dog machine and top of ice machine )
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with tight fitting lids. (lids are up)
